info.title: dg-code
info.description: [BETA] This software is in beta. Features may change and some functionality may be incomplete. Please report issues to support@ironbox.io. | Roslyn-based security analyzer for C#/.NET projects with 400+ rules covering multiple Azure services (Storage, Key Vault, Cosmos DB, SQL, Service Bus, Functions, and more). Collects evidence for compliance workflows. SARIF output for GitHub Actions and Azure DevOps.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: IronBox DataGuard CLI - Security and code quality analyzer for C# projects

commands.name: scan
commands.description: Scan C# solution or project for security and quality issues

commands.name: list-services
commands.description: List all available Azure services and analyzer counts

commands.name: list-analyzers
commands.description: List all available analyzers with their IDs and titles

commands.name: profile
commands.description: Profile a solution or project (code metrics, dependencies, and Bill of Materials)

commands.name: baseline
commands.description: Manage diagnostic baselines for incremental adoption

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create a new baseline from current analysis results

commands.name: update
commands.description: Update an existing baseline with current results
